name: David Kim
bio: Met at a tech conference in Seoul. We often discuss AI trends and enjoy Korean food together.

name: Emma Wilson
bio: My cousin from Vancouver. We grew up together and still share family stories and recipes.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: Former manager who guided me in my first job. Extremely knowledgeable about project management.

name: James Wright
bio: Travel companion from our Europe backpacking trip. Always ready for the next adventure.

name: Aisha Rahman
bio: University roommate from Dhaka. We studied late nights together and still share everything.

name: Marcus Okoro
bio: My brother-in-law and football teammate. We play weekend matches and talk about family.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Creative director colleague. We collaborate on branding projects and share design inspiration.

name: Carlos Mendoza
bio: Guitarist from our weekend band. We write songs and perform at local cafes.

name: Fatima Al-Sayed
bio: Co-founder of our small e-commerce startup. We hustle together and celebrate small wins.

name: Liam Thompson
bio: Photography club friend. We go on weekend shoots and critique each other's work.

name: Sofia Patel
bio: Aunt who taught me traditional Indian recipes. We cook together during festivals.

name: Kwame Osei
bio: Senior engineer who mentors me. We talk about career growth and new technologies.
